subcodes.first_line: O My Leaf! Upon thee be My glory! Today the effulgent rays of the Sun of Truth have illumined the world [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ورقتی علیک بهائی امروز اشراقات انوار آفتاب حقیقت عالم را منور فرموده
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @praise and encouragement, @development of capacity and readiness
